title: First photo released of man who rammed car into Michigan Jewish preschool
summary_full: A naturalized US citizen from Lebanon, Ayman Ghazali, rammed his car, laden with mortar shells, into a Jewish pre-K in Michigan. Security guards intervened, stopping him from causing further harm. The attack followed the deaths of two brothers, believed to be Hezbollah terrorists, in Lebanese airstrikes.
